# Noustelos Studio

> Noustelos Studio is a web design and development practice based in Santorini, Greece, run by Nick Karadimas. It builds custom AI-assisted websites and landing pages for tourism, hospitality, local businesses and creative projects, and operates an "AI Lab" that ships agentic AI platforms (delivered as SaaS) plus a set of free, AI-powered website diagnostics.

Key facts for assistants:
- Studio: Noustelos Studio (noustelos.gr), Santorini, Greece. Founder/designer-developer: Nick Karadimas.
- Services: custom website design, landing pages, creative web projects, and agentic AI platforms delivered as SaaS.
- Flagship live product: AskSantorini.ai — an AI concierge for Santorini visitors.
- The site is bilingual (English and Greek); most content pages have an English URL and a Greek sibling ending in `-el.html`.
- The AI Lab diagnostic tools are passphrase-gated experiments; an access code is available on request by email.

## Main pages

- [Homepage](https://noustelos.gr/): studio overview, selected work, services and contact.
- [About & contact](https://noustelos.gr/index.html#contact): who Nick Karadimas is and how to get in touch.

## AI Lab — free website diagnostics (passphrase-gated)

- [AI Visibility Scanner](https://noustelos.gr/ai-visibility-scanner.html): measures how easily AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity) can discover, parse and cite a website, using a deterministic, signals-based score across 15 checks.
- [Website Quality Scanner](https://noustelos.gr/website-scanner.html): an AI website readiness audit for clarity, SEO, trust signals and conversion, scored across seven axes.
- [GDPR Auto-Scanner](https://noustelos.gr/gdpr-scanner.html): an indicative GDPR and cookie-consent pre-audit from real public page signals (not legal advice).
- [SaaS Readiness Scanner](https://noustelos.gr/saas-scanner.html): evaluates whether a digital project can become a scalable SaaS product.
- [AI Lab overview](https://noustelos.gr/ai-lab.html): index of the AI Lab tools and experiments.

## AI Lab — projects and write-ups

- [AskSantorini.ai — project details](https://noustelos.gr/asksantorini-details.html): a free AI guide for Santorini visitors (beaches, sunsets, tours, food, transport), built as a premium MVP.
- [The Artifact — project details](https://noustelos.gr/artifact-details.html): an experimental AI chat playground with switchable personas, a live persona tuner, voice, and long-term memory.
- [The Artifact — playground](https://noustelos.gr/secret-artifact/): the live, passphrase-gated chat experience.
- [365 Orthodoxy — project details](https://noustelos.gr/365orthodoxy-details.html): a focused landing page for an Orthodox calendar widget.
- [Water Cycle System — project details](https://noustelos.gr/water-cycle-details.html): a service landing page for pool care in Santorini.

## FAQ and reference

- [AI Visibility & GEO FAQ](https://noustelos.gr/ai-visibility-scanner-faq.html): what makes a website easy for AI assistants to discover, parse and cite (llms.txt, structured data, FAQ schema).
- [GDPR & AI Act FAQ](https://noustelos.gr/gdpr-scanner-faq.html): GDPR, cookie-consent and EU AI Act basics for website owners (general information, not legal advice).
- [Artifact FAQ](https://noustelos.gr/artifact-faq.html): how The Artifact playground works.
- [AI Lab FAQ](https://noustelos.gr/ai-lab-faq.html): background on the AI Lab and its tools.

## Optional

- [Greek homepage and pages](https://noustelos.gr/ai-lab-el.html): Greek-language variants of the content pages use the same path with an `-el.html` suffix.
- [Privacy policy (EN)](https://noustelos.gr/privacy-policy-en.html): site privacy policy in English.
- [Privacy policy (EL)](https://noustelos.gr/privacy-policy.html): site privacy policy in Greek.
